title: Random Number Generator - Generate Random Integers
description: Free random number generator. Generate random integers within a specified range instantly.
keywords: random number generator, random integer, number generator, random picker
intro: Generate one or more random integers within a specified range.

faq.a: The generator uses JavaScript's Math.random(), which is a pseudo-random number generator. It's suitable for most purposes but not for cryptographic use.

faq.q: Can I generate multiple numbers at once?
faq.a: Yes, specify how many random numbers you want to generate and they will all appear in the result.
